eq: the pronunciation of h varies. Sometimes it is pronounced as in Swahili or English
eq_dg: Hirifo h wakati mwingine rinatamkwa dza Chiswahili au Chiingereza, ela wakati mwingine rinatamkwa pole-pole dza kuphephesa. Hirifo h kahi-kahi ya vokali mbiri rinatamkwa na mpumo wa pudzi.

eq: three (form used when preceded by a vowel)

Ujanga, neno risiro ra kpweli, udanganyifu.
Msiba, wakati wa kuririra mutu ariyefwa.
Ati, kpwa kpweli (neno ra kusemera habari ambayo usiiamini au uisikira kula kpwa mutu).
Hangu, kula wakati fulani hadi sambi.

Hara, neno ra kuonyesa atu ambao unagomba kuahusu (mbali).
Kuhala, kuchukula chitu.
Kpwa uharaka, bila kukawia.

eq: joint effort of group of people
eq_dg: Bidii ya phamwenga ya kundi ra atu kuhenda kazi.

Sana kupita vyosi, zaidi ya vyosi.

eq: reconcile: only used of a parent restoring good relations with their child
eq_dg: Kuuyiza mahusiano kahi-kahi ya mzazi na mwanawe bada ya kutogombana, wakati mwingine na sherehe ambayo mzazi anamtemia mwanawe madzi.

eq: hephula kueleza mapatano kati ya mzazi na mwanawe
eq_dg: Kuhephula, kueleza mapatano kahi-kahi ya mzazi na mwanawe.

eq: remove a pot from the fire
eq_dg: Kuusa sufuriya au nyungu kula mohoni.

eq: at the time or place of

eq: kare long ago, “Once upon a time”

eq: magic charm usually worn around the arm

eq: expression used as a polite inquiry before entering a house or room: unless an answer is given

eq: press (e.g. a button), to test for ripeness
eq_dg: Kubiga chitu kpwa chala, dza chifungo au kupima tunda ichikala rikaiva.

eq_sw: kutolika kwa sababu ya kutopikwa vizuri

eq: type of wild fruit with a yellow shell containing large edible seeds
eq_sw: aina ya matunda ya mwituni yenye rangi ya manjano na mbegu zake zinaliwa
eq_dg: Aina ya tunda ra mwitu renye ganda ra njano na mbegu kulu zinazorwa.
Kuripha mutu fedha ili akuhendere upendeleo, rushwa.

eq: test for ripeness with one's fingers
eq_dg: Kupima tunda kpwa vyala ulole ichikala rikaiva.
Kuponda chitu, kuseta.

eq: splash water over someone or something

eq_dg: Kumwagira mutu au chitu madzi dzulu.
Kuzamisha mutu au chitu kpwenye madzi.

eq: be well off (i.e. a bit wealthy)
eq_dg: Kukala na mali kidide, kukala mutu wa katikati si maskini wala si tajiri.

eq: restaurant or bar, not usually with accommodation
eq_dg: Phatu pha kuuzira na kunwa chakurya, ela si phatu pha kulala.
Maneno garigotayarishwa kugombwa mbere za atu.

eq: nest of a twazi made from a kind of gum or resin
eq_dg: Nyumba ya nyuchi aina ya twazi inayodzengbwa na utomvu.

eq: husu inayotengezwa na gamu ama utomvu
eq_dg: Utomvu au gamu inayohumirwa ni nyuchi aina ya twazi kudzenga nyumba yao.

eq: pick fruits or leaves from a plant

eq: relate to, to be concerned with, to apply to

eq: concern, to relate to, to be about

eq: creamy milk got by grating coconut and straining the pulp (with water)

eq_sw: remove the husks from grain by pounding in a mortar; kutwanga
